# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

## User stories / User flow

1. User should see “Bajaj Finance Limited” instead of Bajaj Finserv logo in the confirm interest screen. (Design shared has replaced logo with Text, will have to get in touch with Pratik for logo)
2. For “Foreclosure” on the confirm interest screen, “Free” should be change to “Nil”.
3. “Lending Partners“ entry point on the website footer
4. This will lead to a landing page that shows Bajaj and Tata. votlmoney.in/lending-partners
5. Selfie should be triggered for each Bajaj application. Currently this is live only for Bajaj B2C customers.

## Requirements

1. Privacy Policy changes:
